---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new database topic, concept, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## Database(s) Affected
- [ ] MySQL
- [ ] PostgreSQL
- [ ] SQLite
- [ ] Redis
- [ ] All

## Topic/Concept
Describe the SQL or database concept that should be covered:
- Topic name:
- Complexity level: Beginner / Intermediate / Advanced
- Related to existing module: (e.g., `08_relationship`)

## Motivation
Why is this feature/topic important for learning?
- Use case:
- Learning value:
- Prerequisites:

## Suggested Implementation
```
- Create scripts in /database/XX_topic-name/
- Include example queries
- Add test cases
```

## Example Query
```sql
-- Provide an example of what this feature would look like
```

## Additional Context
- Links to documentation
- Reference materials
- Any other relevant information
